name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new chart or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
What would you like to see added or improved?

## Chart Type (if applicable)
- [ ] New chart type: ___________
- [ ] Improvement to existing chart: ___________
- [ ] New dataset / domain: ___________
- [ ] Backend API endpoint
- [ ] Frontend UI change

## Data Story
What insight or story should this visualization tell?

## Mockup / Reference
Link to any reference charts or attach a rough sketch.

## Additional Context
Any other context, libraries, or examples you'd like to share.
